message:
refactor: extract AI card result types from CardFactoryModal.tsx (#8608) [part 2] (#8838)

45-line code movement out of CardFactoryModal.tsx (now 1587 -> 1556 lines)
into a new cardFactoryAiTypes.ts. Zero behavior change; moves the
AiCardT1Result / AiCardT2Result interfaces, the AiMode type alias, and
the validateT1Result / validateT2Result validators used by the AI Create
tab. All references are local to CardFactoryModal.tsx.

Follow-up to #8834; further extractions to come.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
